input: multi-modal knowledge graph (MMKG) with user-item interactions and multi-modal features (text, image, audio, sentiment) of music items
output: ranked list of music items for a user
backbone: graph convolutional network with three aggregators (multi-modal, user, item)
loss: BPR loss with ratio negative sampling
key_idea: aggregate multi-modal features (text, image, audio, sentiment) of music items and high-order structural information via GCN on a multi-modal knowledge graph
